title: Cold Outreach Message Tool not receiving data
symptom: The Cold Outreach Message tool in the subworkflow does not receive the expected input data from the AI Agent workflow, resulting in failure to execute properly.
applies_when: Data is passed from AI Agent workflow
not_this_if: Data is correctly formatted and passed
root_cause: The Cold Outreach Message tool is not receiving the necessary input data because the fields are not properly described using the `$fromAI` function. This function needs explicit descriptions for each field to ensure data is correctly passed from the AI Agent to the subworkflow.
fix_steps: Open the Cold Outreach Message tool settings in the subworkflow.
Update the input fields to use the `$fromAI` function with appropriate descriptions, e.g., `{{ $fromAI('message','The outreach message you are going to send', 'string') }}`.
Save the changes and re-test the workflow.
agent_instruction: Ensure to describe each input field using the `$fromAI` function in the Cold Outreach Message tool.
